title: AGT Agent Trust Profile Schema
description: Schema for an AGT Agent Mesh IATP (Inter-Agent Trust Protocol) trust profile. One profile per agent. Used by the Two-Dimensional Trust Model: trust profile (this schema) combined with BOSS Score (ADAM-sovereign) determines autonomous execution authorization. The trust profile is maintained by AGT Agent Mesh; ADAM reads it but does not write to it.
adam_integration_note: This is an AGT-provided construct. ADAM's CORE Graph Agent vertex stores a reference (agent_id / DID) to this profile. The Two-Dimensional Trust Model uses trust_score combined with the BOSS Score composite to determine the appropriate execution tier. ADAM's BOSS Score is not derived from this profile — it is ADAM-sovereign.

agent_id.description: ADAM CORE Graph agent identifier. Foreign key to AgentVertex in the CORE Engine.

agent_did.description: W3C Decentralized Identifier issued by AGT Agent Mesh at provisioning time. Format: did:azure:<identifier>

agent_class.description: ADAM agent class. Maps to an execution ring assignment in agent-ring-assignments.yaml.

execution_ring.description: AGT execution ring assigned to this agent. 0=Meta-Governance (highest), 3=Work Group (execution). Derived from agent_class via agent-ring-assignments.yaml.

current_trust_score.description: Current IATP trust score (0-1000). Continuously updated by Agent Mesh on each inter-agent interaction. This is an agent-level score, not an action-level score. Do not confuse with BOSS Score (action-level, 0-100, ADAM-sovereign).

trust_tier.description: Human-readable tier derived from current_trust_score. verified=900+, trusted=700-899, standard=500-699, probationary=300-499, untrusted=<300.

adam_execution_authorization.description: ADAM Two-Dimensional Trust Model execution authorization gates. Derived from trust_tier combined with BOSS Score tier requirements in exception-economy-config.yaml.

autonomous_execution_eligible.description: True if current_trust_score >= 700 (SOAP tier requirement). BOSS Score must also be in SOAP range (0-10) for autonomous execution.

governor_review_required.description: True if current_trust_score < 300 (agent trust below ELEVATED tier threshold).

agent_suspended.description: True if current_trust_score < 100. Agent suspended from all execution. Suspension requires Governor Agent review and CISO reinstatement.

assessment_timestamp_ns.description: Timestamp of most recent IATP trust assessment in Unix nanoseconds.

assessment_interval_seconds.description: How frequently IATP reassesses this agent's trust score. Configured in agentMesh.trustScoreRefreshInterval in Helm values.

identity_verification.description: AGT Agent Mesh cryptographic identity state for this agent

did_status.description: Current status of the agent's W3C DID in the revocation registry

key_algorithm.description: Cryptographic algorithm used for this agent's identity key

key_vault_key_ref.description: Azure Key Vault reference for the agent's Ed25519 key material. Key never exported — operations performed by Key Vault.

last_verified_ns.description: Timestamp of last successful identity verification in Unix nanoseconds

mtls_enabled.description: Whether mutual TLS is active for this agent's inter-agent communications (Istio + Agent Mesh)

trust_score_history.description: Recent trust score assessments. Ordered most-recent first. Used for trend analysis by the Stability & Drift Plane.

delta.description: Change from previous score. Negative = trust decrease.

contributing_event.description: Event ID that contributed to a score change (if triggered by interaction_event)

suspension_status.description: Agent suspension state. An agent with trust_score < 100 is automatically suspended.

suspended_at_ns.description: Timestamp when suspension was triggered. Null if not suspended.

minimum_suspension_end_ns.description: Earliest timestamp at which suspension review can begin. Minimum 60 minutes from suspension (configurable in Helm values).

governor_review_completed.description: Whether Domain Governor Agent review of suspension has been completed

ciso_reinstatement_required.description: Whether CISO Director approval is required before reinstatement. Always true for production deployments.

reinstatement_flight_recorder_event_id.description: Flight Recorder event ID recording the CISO reinstatement authorization. Null until reinstated.

interaction_statistics.description: Aggregate statistics from Agent Mesh interaction history. Used by IATP for trust score computation.

anomalous_interactions.description: Interactions flagged as anomalous by IATP

ring_violations_attempted.description: Number of cross-ring escalation attempts (should be 0 in normal operation)

boss_high_actions_count.description: Count of actions where this agent's action triggered HIGH BOSS tier (51-75)

boss_ohshat_actions_count.description: Count of actions where this agent's action triggered OHSHAT tier (76-100)

boss_score_correlation.description: How this agent's trust profile correlates with BOSS Score outcomes. Populated by the ADAM analytics layer, not by AGT.

average_boss_composite.description: Average BOSS composite score across all this agent's actions

security_impact_avg.description: Average BOSS Security Impact dimension score. Correlated with trust score.

doctrinal_alignment_avg.description: Average BOSS Doctrinal Alignment dimension score. Indicator of value drift.
